hero.headline:
Healing that begins within

the Word
hero.subheadline: A therapeutic journey integrating faith, neuroscience, and endocrinology. For women, couples, families, and leaders who want real healing — not easy answers.
hero.hebrewTagline: חַיִל · Woman of Valor · Family That Works · Healthy Relationships

forWhom.title: Every journey has its starting point
forWhom.subtitle: You don't need to have everything figured out to begin. You only need the courage to take the first step.

woman.description: You carry so much. Maybe you've lost the thread of who you are beneath the roles you play. Here you'll work on identity, your hormonal cycle, emotions, and limiting beliefs — with the Word as your anchor.

couple.description: Marriage isn't a contract — it's a covenant. If something is off-center, asking for help isn't weakness. Here you'll work on your dynamics, communication, and how to honor one another even in conflict.

family.description: Every family carries stories — blessings and wounds passed down through generations. Here you'll understand the patterns in your family system and how to interrupt what doesn't serve the next generation.

leader.description: Healthy leadership is born of secure identity. If you lead — in church, at work, at home — and feel the weight of loneliness at the top, of performance, or of missing healthy boundaries, this space is yours.

forWhom.footer: Not sure where to begin? <link>Take the free assessment</link> and Rafa will show you the way.

rafa.title:
Rafa — from Raphael,

which means God heals
rafa.intro: Rafa isn't a generic chatbot. She's a Christian therapist trained in the integration of faith and science — direct, warm, and grounded in the Word. She won't tell you what you want to hear. She'll tell you what you need.

chat.text: I feel overwhelmed by everything. I don't even know who I am anymore outside of my roles.

I'm so glad you brought this here. Before anything else — how are you arriving today? It doesn't have to be perfect.

What you just said holds a lot. Tell me: when was the last time you did something that was only yours — not for others, not out of obligation?

I hear that. And I want you to know: this isn't a character flaw. It's the exhaustion of someone who learned she only matters when she's serving.

Proverbs 31 speaks of a woman of strength, chayil — not because she never rested, but because she knew where her strength came from. Shall we work on this together?

pillars.title: It's not just therapy. It's integration.
pillars.subtitle: Every session, every module, every journal entry is built on these six principles.

items.title: The Word as foundation
items.body: We don't arrive at Scripture at the end as a spiritual extra. We start from it. What God says is more real than what you feel. Therapy works from that certainty.

items.title: Messianic Jewish perspective
items.body: The Sabbath as a rhythm of rest. The feasts as a calendar of healing. Shalom as wholeness, not merely peace. Chayil as a value of character. Faith has deep Hebrew roots — and that matters.

items.title: Science as revelation
items.body: Neuroscience, endocrinology, and psychology don't contradict faith — they reveal how God made us. To understand your nervous system, your hormonal cycle, and your attachment patterns is to know God's work in you more deeply.

items.title: Honor culture
items.body: Healing doesn't happen in an atmosphere of shame. Honor culture calls you to your highest identity — it doesn't expose, diminish, or accuse. You are called to be who God says you are.

items.title: Real emotional regulation
items.body: We were made for relationship — and it's in relationship that we regulate. Polyvagal theory reveals how our nervous system seeks safety, and how praise, lament, and presence are practices of regulation as much as they are spiritual.

items.title: Stewardship as a way of life
items.body: Body, mind, time, relationships, talents, and finances — everything is stewardship. Caring for yourself isn't selfishness, it's responsibility before God. The body is a temple. Emotions are data, not enemies.

modules.title: Each module, a journey
modules.subtitle: Buy individually, lifetime access. You move at your own pace, with Rafa by your side.
modules.noteBody: The initial assessment is free. In 15 minutes, Rafa analyzes your answers and points you to the right modules for you.

subscription.title: Rafa, every day
subscription.subtitle: The modules are yours forever. The subscription opens Rafa's daily presence — without limits — and the community. Healing happens along the way, not in a single event.
benefits: Unlimited Rafa — your therapist present every day, holding the memory of your journey
A community of women in healing, under honor culture (coming soon)
New sessions and practices as they arrive
subscription.fineprint: Cancel anytime · The modules you've bought stay yours

howItWorks.title: Your journey in 4 steps
howItWorks.subtitle: Simple to begin. Deep to live.

steps.title: Free assessment
steps.body: Answer 8 questions about where you are — spiritually, emotionally, in your relationships. Rafa analyzes them and generates a personalized report with your profile and the right modules for you.

steps.title: Choose your modules
steps.body: Purchase the recommended modules individually. Lifetime access — come back whenever you like. Each module has teaching content, practical exercises, anchor scriptures, and sessions with Rafa.

steps.title: Sessions with Rafa
steps.body: Talk with Rafa whenever you need — in a general session or within the context of a specific module. She remembers what you've already worked through and picks up where you left off.

steps.title: Journal & check-in
steps.body: Record your insights, gratitude, and the things God has been speaking. Rafa responds with a gentle reflection. Each month, do the check-in and see how you've grown in every area.
steps.detail: Guided prompts · AI reflection · Monthly trends

testimonials.title: Real journeys
testimonials.subtitle: Names changed for privacy. Words untouched.

items.quote: I always knew I had things to work through, but I couldn't find a space that was both biblically solid and psychologically serious. BLOOMING is that.
items.name: Ana Paula

items.quote: Rafa asked me a question in our first session that I couldn't answer. I spent three days thinking about it. I didn't expect that from an AI — I'd expect it from an excellent therapist.
items.name: Fernanda

items.quote: My husband and I went through the Marriage module together. I didn't expect a digital platform to create so much safe space for hard conversations.
items.name: Carla & Ricardo

items.quote: Understanding my cycle as something spiritual and not only biological changed how I relate to my own emotional states. It was revolutionary.
items.name: Gabriela

items.quote: As a pastor, I carried the loneliness of leadership without a name for it. The Leaders module gave me language for what I felt and a way out.
items.name: Pr. Marcos

items.quote: The guided journal surprised me the most. It's not just writing — it's being invited to go deeper than I would on my own.
items.name: Isabela

assessmentCta.title:
Your assessment.

Free. 15 minutes.
assessmentCta.subtitle: Rafa analyzes your answers and generates a personalized report on where you are — with your areas of greatest need and the exact modules to begin your healing journey.
assessmentCta.fineprint: No credit card · 100% free assessment · Confidential

items.a: No — and it doesn't aim to. BLOOMING is a space for ongoing spiritual-therapeutic growth, available anytime. For acute crises, clinical disorders, or matters requiring diagnosis, we always recommend in-person professionals. But for most people, BLOOMING offers a depth of work that complements any therapeutic process.

items.q: Rafa is an artificial intelligence. How can I trust her?
items.a: Rafa is powered by one of the most advanced language models in the world, guided by a deeply grounded system of instructions — biblical, neuroscientific, clinical. She doesn't improvise. She operates within carefully built principles. That said, every response is your starting point for reflection, not the final word. You discern with the Spirit.

items.q: Are my conversations and data confidential?
items.a: Yes. Your sessions, journal entries, and assessment answers are stored securely and never shared with third parties. You are the only person with access to your history.

items.q: What is the initial assessment, and why is it free?
items.a: The assessment is an 8-question evaluation covering identity, emotional health, spirituality, relationships, body, beliefs, marriage, and purpose. Rafa analyzes your answers and generates a personalized report. It's free because we believe everyone deserves to know the starting point of their journey before investing.

items.q: Can I use BLOOMING even if I'm not a practicing Christian?
items.a: BLOOMING is built on Christian, biblical foundations. If you're in a process of faith, have doubts, or are finding your way back, you're welcome. If you have no openness to faith as part of the process, our approach may not be the best fit — and that's okay. We're honest about that.

No. When you purchase a module, you have lifetime access. That includes every content update made in the future. You move at your own pace — start today, pause for two months, and come back whenever you like.

items.q: What is the Messianic Jewish perspective?
items.a: It's the understanding that our faith has deep Hebrew roots. The Sabbath as a rhythm of rest, not merely a rule. The Jewish feasts as a calendar of healing and revelation. The concept of shalom as total wholeness — not just the absence of conflict. The name and character of Jesus (Yeshua) in the context of His original culture. It enriches faith without replacing anything — it only deepens it.

items.q: How does the monthly check-in work?
items.a: Once a month, the platform invites you to 6 quick questions (about 3 minutes). Rafa compares your answers to the previous month, identifies trends, and generates a personalized reflection on what's growing and where there's still work to do.

footer.tagline: Integrative Christian therapy. Faith, neuroscience, and endocrinology in the service of deep healing — for women, couples, families, and leaders.
footer.verse:
A woman of valor, who can find her?

— Proverbs 31:10
footer.builtWith: Built with purpose · Grounded in the Word

questions.text: How do you feel about your identity as a woman?

How is your connection with God right now?

questions.text: What limiting beliefs do you recognize you carry?
If you're married — how is your marriage?

Journal.title: Journal
Journal.streakDays: {count, plural, one {# day in a row} other {# days in a row}}
Journal.emptyBody: Start by writing what's on your heart today.
prompts: What has God been speaking to me this week?
Where am I feeling resistance — and what might it be protecting?
Which biblical truth do I need to anchor in today?
What would I like to leave here and carry no longer?
Journal.contentPlaceholder: Write freely. This is just for you.
Journal.gratitudePlaceholder: What are you grateful for today?
Journal.insightPlaceholder: An insight, a realization, a word...

Session.title: Sessions
Session.countWithRafa: {count, plural, one {# session with Rafa} other {# sessions with Rafa}}
Session.emptyBody: Rafa is ready to talk. How are you arriving today?
Session.opening:
Shalom. I'm so glad you came.

Before we begin — how are you arriving here today? It doesn't have to be perfect. It can be a word, a feeling, a question that won't leave your mind.

I'm here.
Session.openingWelcome:
Shalom. I've just read what you shared in your initial map — and before anything else, thank you for being honest.

We don't need to solve anything now. I just want to hear you. Of everything you answered, what weighed the most? What would you most like me to understand about you?

I'm here.
Session.inputHint: Press Enter to send · Shift+Enter for a new line

Profile.cyclePhaseLabel: Current phase · Day {day} of the cycle

menstrual.name: Menstrual (days 1–5)
menstrual.desc: A time of rest, introspection and reflection. Like the Sabbath.

follicular.name: Follicular (days 6–13)
follicular.desc: Rising energy, mental clarity. New beginnings.

ovulatory.name: Ovulatory (days 14–17)
ovulatory.desc: Peak of expression, connection and confidence. Great for communication.

luteal.name: Luteal (days 18–28)
luteal.desc: Introspection and discernment. Don't make impulsive decisions.
